name: portuguese-services-answer-in-portuguese
description: Regression from a real transcript: a Portuguese user asking 'Que serviços vocês oferecem?' got a mixed reply — an English service list ('main thing I handle here is websites - logos, ads, SEO audits, chatbots ... go through our team directly') tailing into a Portuguese question. Root cause was a verbatim English template at prompts.js:548. After converting it to language-neutral intent guidance, the whole reply must be in the user's language, carrying none of the English template fragments.

reply_not_contains: what kind of business is it
